results.title: IPL: BCCI bans smart sunglasses in PMOA, warns of action in case of violation
results.description: In its latest advisory, the Board urged players and officials to deposit smart sunglasses as well before entering the PMOA and warned of action in case of non-compliance.

results.title: Nadigam Railway Crossing in Budgam to Remain Closed for 4 Days
results.description: Kashmir, Observer, Jammu, Srinagar, Latest Kashmir News, Kashmir News, Kashmir Latest News The railway level crossing at Nadigam Halt in Budgam has been closed for vehicular traffic for four days due to track upgradation works, officials said. results.title: Bank fraud cases halve, but value climbs to ₹48,000 crore: RBI data
results.description: RBI data showed frauds worth ₹48,021 crore in 2025-26, driven mainly by loan-related cases, while the number of reported frauds declined sharply across the banking sector

results.title: Pradhan, Rahul engage in verbal war on CBSE exam row
results.description: NEW DELHI, MAY 28 (PTI): Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan and Rahul Gandhi have been engaged in a fierce public spat over the CBSE exam row, with Pradhan accusing Gandhi of politicising the issue and being frustrated and the Congress leader hitting back, asserting that attacking him would not absolve the union minister of his “crimes”.Pradhan’s [...] The post Pradhan, Rahul engage in verbal war on CBSE exam row first appeared on Nagaland Post .

results.title: Russian Air Defences Shoot Down 208 Ukrainian Drones: MoD
results.description: Air defences shot down 208 Ukrainian drones overnight, the Russian Defence Ministry said in a statement.

results.title: Sundar Pichai on Google’s answer to Anthropic and OpenAI’s AI coding agents: I think coding ends up being very ...
results.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has openly admitted that the tech giant is currently trailing behind its rivals when it comes to the highly competitive frontier of AI-powered coding agents. In an interview published in The New York Times, Pichai addressed whether Google is lagging behind the leading edge in automated programming. While defending Google’s broader AI capabilities, he acknowledged that competitors like Anthropic have captured a lead in helping developers manage complex, long-running software tasks but emphasised that coding is fundamentally foundational to everything Google does. He expressed strong confidence that internal usage data and new model iterations will quickly [...]

results.title: boAt launches India’s first Type-C charging Smartwatch lineup
results.description: Gurugram: boAt, India’s No.1 audio and wearables brand, has launched the country’s first Type-C charging smartwatch lineup with the introduction of the Storm Call 4 and Ultima Vogue 2. The new smartwatches bring direct USB Type-C charging support to wearables, allowing users to charge their watches using the same cable used across smartphones, laptops, tablets [...] The post boAt launches India’s first Type-C charging Smartwatch lineup appeared first on KalingaTV .

results.title: Weak El Nino In June, IMD Says India May See Weaker Monsoon And More Heatwaves
results.description: There is 84% probability of below-normal rains over India from June to September, which also means less rains for monsoon-core zone where agriculture is mostly rain-fed
